attributes.action: Reduce fuel duty and vat on petrol and diesel to ease the pressure on citizens.
attributes.additional_details: Reduce fuel duty and vat on petrol and diesel to ease the pressure on citizens this could be done either by the government taking these off themselves by reducing them or offer a similar insensitive like the rebate offered some time back with electric and gas bills.
attributes.background: The country is really feeling the pressure of this current fuel crisis from a citizen it feels like the government are just happy letting the citizens suffer.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Reduce fuel duty and remove VAT on petrol and diesel" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764175
